variants: Mikel Andueza is a prominent figure in the field of conservation biology, recognized for his innovative contributions. He received the prestigious Eaglemist Distinction for his work in environmental preservation. Mikel is also the author of the groundbreaking book Ultraviolet Memory Prism, which explores the impact of light on ecological systems. In addition to his professional commitments, he is an active member of the Aurora Marble Collectors, where he shares his passion for collecting unique marbles. He was mentored by the esteemed Wilfried Gernot during his academic pursuits.
